channel.title: 📖 Level Guides on 🎮 Human: Fall Flat - Walkthroughs & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in 📖 Level Guides on 🎮 Human: Fall Flat - Walkthroughs & Guides

item.title: 🏰 Level 1: Mansion Walkthrough
item.description:
🏰 Level 1: Mansion

Objective: Leave the starting courtyard, pass through the four safety gates of the mansion, and swing across the crane hook to reach the exit helicopter. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐☆☆☆☆ | Est. Duration 8 Mins Mechanics: Stretching arms, grabbing/pulling gates, climbing ledges, and coordinating jump momentum.

📸 Starting Yard: You wake up in this yard. Stretch your arms and test wobbly controls.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: The Training Room

  • Goal: Get familiar with camera tracking and wobbly hand bindings.
  • Walkthrough: After falling from the sky, walk around using WASD. Practice grabbing the black debris on the ground by holding the Left/Right Mouse Button.

Stage 2: Climbing the First Brick Wall

  • Solution A (Regular): Walk up to the brick wall, look straight up at the sky, raise both hands, jump and grab the ledge. Keep holding the mouse clicks, look straight down at the ground, and hold W to pull Bob over.
  • Solution B (Physics Ramp): Grab the wooden board nearby, place it against the low wall to create a ramp, and walk right up.

Stage 3: Scaffold & Balance Beam

  • Walkthrough: Head to the back of the courtyard to find a yellow steel scaffold. Climb it, keep your balance on the narrow beam (hold Shift to bend over slightly to prevent falling), and jump through the opening onto the mansion balcony.

Stage 4: Crane Hook Swing ⭐ Key Puzzle

This is the core puzzle of the Mansion map, which often stumps new players.

📸 Crane Hook: Swing across the high gap to the container on the opposite side.
  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. Go to the base of the yellow crane. Jump and grab the hook, then pull it back toward the high balcony.
    2. Climb the boxes nearby to reach the highest balcony ledge.
    3. Run and jump to grab the hook. Swing across the gap, and release at the peak of the forward arc to land on the green container.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Pendulum Swing Secret】
Never let go of the hook at the lowest point of your swing. Instead, release your clicks at the **highest point of the forward arc (when horizontal speed stops for a millisecond)**, and press Space. Your momentum will carry you safely across.

🏆 Hidden Easter Eggs

  1. ⚽ World Cup Striker: Near the starting door, a soccer ball is hidden. Kick or push it using Bob’s hands all the way through the gates to the net behind the door to unlock a secret achievement.
  2. Double Ziplining: In multiplayer, one Bob grabs the crane hook, while the second Bob grabs the first Bob’s legs. Swing together to cross the gap in a wobbly link!

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 5 - 12 Mins Take your time to build muscle memory with lead grabs
Speedrun Record 22.8 Seconds Wall-climb directly over the final gate
Mechanics Used 100% Gravity Pendulum Point your camera down when climbing over edges

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 2: Factory

item.title: 🏭 Level 2: Factory Walkthrough
item.description:
🏭 Level 2: Factory

Objective: Maneuver through wobbly conveyor belts, stack heavy boxes to press pressure plates, operate crane levers, and cross the giant vacuum pipes to reach the level exit. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐☆☆☆ | Est. Duration 15 Mins Mechanics: Conveyor friction, heavy gear momentum, crane arm manipulation, and box physics stacking.

📸 Factory Floor: Stack boxes on plates to activate electrical circuits and power doors.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: The Pressure Plate Room

  • Walkthrough: Drag the heavy wooden boxes from the conveyor belts, and stack them directly on the glowing green pressure plates. This keeps the electrical circuits powered, holding the metal doors open.

Stage 2: Moving Conveyor Belts ⛓️ Key Obstacle

  • Walkthrough: Climb onto the fast-moving conveyor belts. Run in the opposite direction (hold Shift) to stay balanced. Reach out with both hands to grab the steel beams overhead, and pull yourself up to the ventilation ducts.

Stage 3: The Heavy Rotating Gears

  • Walkthrough: You will find two massive interlocking gears. Grab the tooth of the first rotating gear to let it lift you up. As you reach the top, quickly release and grab the next gear to transfer your momentum, then drop onto the safe catwalk.

Stage 4: Operating the Crane Arm

  • Walkthrough: Move to the control desk. Grab and push the dual levers to swing the giant crane arm toward the center platform. Run, jump, and hang onto the crane hook. Swing the crane arm around to drop Bob safely onto the exit platform.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Conveyor Belt Slingshot】
You can run on the fast conveyor belt in its moving direction and jump at the very edge. The conveyor's friction velocity will add directly to Bob's jump momentum, launching you over the barrier without doing the gear-climbing puzzles.

🏆 Hidden Easter Eggs

  1. Conveyor Skipping: Clear the entire Factory floor without touching any of the moving conveyor belts. This unlocks the special official achievement for speedrunners.
  2. Bob Cannon: In co-op mode, one player can stand inside the vacuum pipe while the other pulls the pressure release lever, launching the player out of the pipe like a wobbly cannonball!

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 12 - 20 Mins Keep your balance on overhead pipes using crouches
Speedrun Record 41.5 Seconds Execute a super jump off the interlocking gears
Mechanics Used Friction Acceleration Keep boxes centered on plates to prevent slips

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Guides Console

item.title: 🚂 Level 3: Train Walkthrough
item.description:
🚂 Level 3: Train

Objective: Maneuver through a series of railway-themed obstacles, manipulate heavy train carriages on tracks, utilize garbage bins to scale heights, and jump into the final red exit carriage. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐☆☆☆ | Est. Duration 12 Mins Mechanics: Horizontal pull mechanics, carriage friction, high-ledge mantle grabs, and climbing momentum.

📸 Train Tracks: Pull heavy carts along their tracks to bridge gaps or clear paths.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: The First Carriage Blockade

  • Walkthrough: After dropping into the level, you will face a yellow train carriage blocking a doorway. Walk up to the carriage, press and hold the Left/Right Mouse Button to grab the side of the carriage, and walk backwards to pull it out of the way. Once the doorway is clear, walk through.

Stage 2: The Dumpster & Dumpster Skip

  • Standard Walkthrough: A large yellow dumpster blocks your path to the next room. Grab it by the handles and pull it backward to clear the doorway.
  • Dumpster-assisted Wall Climb: Alternatively, instead of moving it completely out of the way, you can push the dumpster directly against the high wall on the right. Climb onto the dumpster, run, jump, and grab the ledge of the high wall to pull yourself over, bypassing the next door entirely.

Stage 3: The Overturned Bench & Flipped Cart

  • Walkthrough: In this area, you will find an overturned wooden bench on a raised platform and a train carriage.
    1. First, flip the bench upright if you want to complete the achievement (see below).
    2. Move to the train carriage. Grab it and pull it away from the wall to create space, or push it against the wall to climb.
    3. Jump from the platform onto the top of the carriage, and use it to reach the higher ledge leading to the next section.

Stage 4: Carriage on Carriage Alignment ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. Enter the yard and locate the red train carriage. Climb the staircase to the high platform.
    2. You will notice a yellow train carriage on the tracks below, which is blocking the upper path.
    3. Jump down to the yellow carriage. Grab the side rails, walk backward, and slide it along the tracks until it is positioned directly under the high platform.
    4. Go back up the stairs, walk onto the yellow carriage, and jump across to the platform on the opposite side to reach the exit.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Carriage Roof Speedrun Skip】
Advanced players do not need to slide carriages on tracks. You can perform a wobbly side-climb by grabbing the side panel of the first train cart, swinging your legs up to gain momentum, and pulling Bob onto the roof. From the roof, you can run and jump across the tops of the carriages to skip the entire track puzzles in under 15 seconds!

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. 🧹 Public Service: Right at the start of the level, you will find a yellow dumpster and 5 pieces of scattered stone debris on the ground. Pick up all 5 pieces of debris and place them inside the dumpster to unlock this achievement.
  2. 🚗 Convertible Ride: Get inside the dumpster, grab the inner walls, and jump while moving forward. Bob will “drive” the dumpster across the ground. Travel 50 meters in this fashion to unlock the achievement.
  3. 🪑 Perfectionist: In the third room, find the overturned bench on the sidewalk. Grab it and flip it back upright so that it sits flat and aligned with the wall.
  4. 📡 Maze Whispers: In multiplayer, if you navigate the dark corners of the train tracks with shadows set to low, you might hear a wobbly developer voice cue echoing through the dream.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 8 - 15 Mins Use double grabs when pulling heavy train carts
Speedrun Record 10.5 Seconds Roof jump across the yellow carriages directly
Mechanics Used Track-constrained Friction Align carts perfectly to prevent jump slips

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 4: Carry

item.title: 📦 Level 4: Carry Walkthrough
item.description:
📦 Level 4: Carry

Objective: Transport wooden boxes across the level, place them on glowing pressure plates to trigger electronic doors, use boxes as step-stools to scale high glass walls, and fall into the exit. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐☆☆☆ | Est. Duration 10 Mins Mechanics: Lifting and carrying physics, manual positioning, box-assisted climbing, and door jamming.

📸 Carrying Box: Lift wooden boxes using both hands to trigger pressure buttons on the floor.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: The Entry Button

  • Walkthrough: Drop into the level and locate the small wooden box on the floor. Raise both arms, grab the box, and walk over to the large yellow floor button. Place the box directly on top of the button to open the glass sliding door.

Stage 2: Through the Grated Window

  • Walkthrough:
    1. In the next room, you will see a box on one side of a locked glass door, and the floor button on your side.
    2. Grab the box, place it on the floor button to open the door, and walk through.
    3. Now, you need to bring the box with you. Grab the box through the open gap or window in the wall, lift it up, and pull it to your side of the room.

Stage 3: The Elevator Lift & Door Jam

  • Walkthrough:
    1. You will reach a section with a raised platform and a sliding gate that only opens when you stand on a button.
    2. Place the box on the button. Since the box keeps the door open, walk through.
    3. If you want the “It’s Stuck” achievement (see below), place the box right under the sliding door so it jams when the button is released.
    4. Carry the box onto the cargo elevator platform, press the button to go up, and transport it to the final area.

Stage 4: Scaling the High Glass Wall ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. In the final area, you are faced with a very high glass railing wall that you cannot climb normally.
    2. Bring the wooden box close to the glass wall.
    3. Climb onto the top of the box. From this elevated position, look up, jump, and grab the ledge of the glass wall.
    4. Pull Bob over the ledge and drop into the exit vortex below.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Railing Skip & Double-Hand Mantle】
You do not actually need the boxes to climb the glass wall. By running along the side railing of the elevator platform, jumping at the absolute edge, and throwing both hands up, you can grab the lip of the high glass wall. Swing Bob's body back and forth, and climb straight over. This skips the entire box carrying process in Stage 4.

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. 🪵 Don’t Get a Splinter!: Unlocked automatically by completing the “Carry” level.
  2. 🚪 It’s Stuck: In Stage 3, take a wooden box and place it precisely in the middle of a sliding door’s path. Walk off the button to let the door close onto the box. Walk through the jammed doorway to unlock the achievement.
  3. 🗼 Tower: Stack all 4 wooden boxes in this level on top of each other. This is easier in multiplayer: one player holds the base box stable while the other lifts and places the remaining boxes. Make sure to keep your camera pointed downward when dropping the boxes to align them perfectly.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 6 - 10 Mins Lift boxes by looking up slightly to prevent floor friction
Speedrun Record 8.2 Seconds Rail-jump directly to the final glass ledge
Mechanics Used Weight-based Activation Jam doors to prevent lockouts in co-op

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 5: Mountain

item.title: ⛰️ Level 5: Mountain Walkthrough
item.description:
⛰️ Level 5: Mountain

Objective: Scale vertical stone cliffs, push a red train carriage to create a bridge, search a pitch-black cavern for hidden gems, swing across a massive ravine using a rope, and throw loudspeakers into a house. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 20 Mins Mechanics: Ledge mantle climbing, object manipulation, swinging rope physics, and cave navigation.

📸 Mountain Ledges: Scale wobbly stone pillars and learn the art of mantle climbing.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: The Winding Stone Ledges

  • Walkthrough: You start at the base of a series of stone pillars. Follow the S-shaped path. Reach high with both hands, jump and grab the ledge of the next rock step. Look down at Bob’s feet while holding the clicks, and hold W to pull yourself over. Continue until you reach the grassy upper ridge.

Stage 2: The Red Train Carriage

  • Walkthrough:
    1. On the ridge, you will find a large red boxcar sitting on rails.
    2. Grab the boxcar and pull it backward to clear the gap on the left, or climb directly onto its roof by using its corner bars.
    3. Run along the top of the boxcar, jump across to the adjacent cliff, and follow the path to the entrance of a dark cavern.

Stage 3: The Dark Cave & Gem Hunt

  • Walkthrough:
    1. The cave is pitch-black. Grab the lantern sitting near the entrance.
    2. Carry the lantern to light your path. You will need to jump over a series of gaps inside the cave.
    3. If you are going for the “My Treasure” achievement, search the dark corners of the cave to find 7 glowing green gems and pile them together.
    4. Exit the cave onto a high ledge overlooking a deep ravine.

Stage 4: The Tarzan Rope Swing ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. Look up to locate a yellow rope hanging from a tree branch above the canyon.
    2. Walk to the edge of the cliff. Jump, stretch your arms, and grab the rope.
    3. Swing back and forth to build momentum.
    4. At the peak of your forward swing, let go of the grab keys and jump forward to land safely on the rocky platform on the opposite side.
    5. Follow the pathway up to a cottage, pull open the door, and fall into the exit.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【One-Handed Swing Climbing (Wall Climbing)】
You can scale almost any vertical cliff face in Mountain using the swing-climbing exploit. Grab the rock wall with one hand. Move your camera left and right to make Bob's body swing. When Bob swings upward, quickly grab higher up the wall with your free hand. Let go with the lower hand and repeat. This allows you to climb straight to the summit, skipping Stage 2 and Stage 3 entirely!

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. ⛰️ What Goes Up: Unlocked automatically by completing the “Mountain” level.
  2. 💎 My Treasure: Gather all 7 glowing green gems hidden inside the cavern and place them in a neat pile. You will need the lantern to locate them in the dark crevices.
  3. 🐒 Tarzan Swing (AH, EO, EO, EO, EO, OOOOO!): Use the rope in Stage 4 to swing across the ravine. Ensure you grab the rope cleanly and swing all the way to the other side to trigger the achievement.
  4. 📢 Silent Hours (Noisy Neighbours): Outside the exit cottage, you will find a set of loudspeakers. Grab the speakers and throw them through the nearest window of the cottage.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 15 - 25 Mins Carry the lantern to prevent falling into cave gaps
Speedrun Record 45.3 Seconds Use swing-climbing to scale the outer mountain walls
Mechanics Used Pendulum Swing Keep your camera centered on the rope when jumping

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 6: Demolition

item.title: 🏗️ Level 6: Demolition Walkthrough
item.description:
🏗️ Level 6: Demolition

Objective: Break through brick walls using heavy wrecking balls, shatter glass window panes with heavy tools, navigate wobbly scaffolding platforms, and swing from the top roof crane hook to the exit. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 18 Mins Mechanics: Glass shattering physics, structural demolition, wrecking ball swinging, and scaffold climbing.

📸 Destruction Zone: Swing the yellow wrecking ball to smash through brick barricades.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: Planks & Shattering Glass

  • Walkthrough: Start by pulling two wooden planks off the door to proceed. In the next room, the door is locked. Pick up the red fire extinguisher from the floor. Lift it high, and throw it hard against the glass window pane to shatter it. Climb through the broken window frame.

Stage 2: The Giant Wrecking Ball ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. You will enter a large yard with a yellow crane control cabin and a swinging bucket wrecking ball.
    2. Climb onto the platform near the wrecking ball. Grab the bucket with both hands.
    3. Swing the bucket backward and forward, using Bob’s body weight to build momentum.
    4. Release the bucket at the peak of its swing to crash it into the brick wall on the far side. Repeat until a large hole is smashed. Climb through.

Stage 3: The Yellow Scaffolding & Gaps

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Walk onto the yellow steel scaffolding. Be careful, as these platforms can tilt under Bob’s wobbly weight.
    2. Jump across the gap to the concrete floor. Use the lever on the wall to lower the elevator cage.
    3. Step inside the cage, pull the lever again to ascend, and climb out onto the higher balcony.

Stage 4: Mattress Stacking & The Roof Crane Exit

  • Walkthrough:
    1. In the room with the mattresses, you must climb through a high window. You can grab and stack two mattresses on top of each other to create a wobbly ramp, allowing you to walk right up.
    2. Climb onto the roof of the building. Walk along the yellow crane boom.
    3. Grab the hanging hook of the crane, swing off the edge of the roof, and release to drop onto the exit balcony below. Fall into the exit pipe.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【The Left Window Wrecking Ball Skip】
You do not need to swing the wrecking ball. Instead of breaking the brick wall, head to the far left ledge of the crane platform. Look toward the window on the left building. Run, jump, and grab the ledge of the window frame. Swing climb your legs up to climb straight into the building, bypassing the wall-smashing puzzle and saving 2 minutes.

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. 🔨 Brute Force: Unlocked automatically by completing the “Demolition” level.
  2. 🪟 Wrong Direction: Complete the level by bypassing the wrecking ball puzzle entirely. Climb through the left building’s window instead of smashing the wall.
  3. ❄️ Surprise! (Avalanche!): In the outdoor construction area, locate a wooden support beam holding back a pile of large boulders. Grab and pull the wooden beam to collapse the structure and trigger the rockslide.
  4. 👊 Primal: Break 4 breakable walls throughout this level using only manual power (throwing random props, running headfirst into the wall cracks, or body-slamming) without using the wrecking ball or fire extinguishers.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 12 - 20 Mins Walk slowly on yellow scaffold beams to avoid slips
Speedrun Record 29.8 Seconds Wall-run off the scaffold directly to the roof
Mechanics Used Elastic Impact Collision Use mattresses as cushions if falling from heights

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 7: Castle

item.title: 🏰 Level 7: Castle Walkthrough
item.description:
🏰 Level 7: Castle

Objective: Smash open locked wooden gates, crank and launch a giant catapult, ride the rotating sails of a windmill, ring a hidden bell, and zipline across the fortress walls to the exit. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins Mechanics: Lock smashing, lever cranks, rotational velocity, catapult launch physics, and zipline tracking.

📸 Fortress Yard: Operate the wooden catapult to launch stones or launch Bob himself!

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: Smashing the Lock

  • Walkthrough: Drop into the castle courtyard. You will find a wooden gate barred by a metal lock. Pick up a loose cobblestone from the ground, lift it above Bob’s head, and slam it down repeatedly onto the lock until it shatters. Open the gate.

Stage 2: The Catapult Siege ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. Locate the giant wooden catapult. Grab the crank wheel and turn it clockwise to lower the catapult sling to the ground.
    2. Pick up a large boulder and place it inside the sling.
    3. Pull the release lever on the catapult to launch the boulder. The impact will smash a hole in the far castle wall.
    4. Repeat the cranking process, but this time, climb into the sling yourself. Pull the release lever (or have a multiplayer friend do it) to launch Bob across the gap and through the broken wall.

Stage 3: The Windmill Sails

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Cross the bridge and climb the stairs to the large windmill.
    2. Reach out and grab one of the rotating wooden sails as it sweeps near the ground.
    3. Ride the sail upward. As you reach the peak of its rotation, release your grip and jump onto the castle rampart platform on the left.

Stage 4: Tower Bell & The Zipline

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Climb the winding staircase inside the high keep. You will reach a belfry with a giant copper bell. Grab the clapper and swing it back and forth to ring the bell for an achievement.
    2. Step out onto the balcony. Grab the wooden handle of the zipline with both hands.
    3. Jump off the balcony and slide along the rope to the opposite side of the fortress.
    4. Land on the high ramparts, open the heavy double doors, and drop into the cavern vortex to exit the level.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Catapult Launch Skip & Rotation Climbing】
Advanced speedrunners can skip the entire windmill and tower climb. By launching Bob with the catapult at a specific angle, you can clear the entire canyon and land directly on the exit castle ramparts. Alternatively, you can use "rotation climbing" (grabbing with one hand, spinning Bob 180 degrees, and grabbing higher with the free hand) on the fortress stone walls to scale the gates in seconds.

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. 🏰 For Whom the Bell Tolls: Ring the giant church bell in the high belfry. You can do this by grabbing the clapper and hitting it against the bell wall, or throwing a stone at it.
  2. ☄️ Improvised Ammo: Launch yourself using the catapult. Make sure you land safely on the far side of the wall after the launch.
  3. 🏃 Smooth Moves: In the alleyway with the lanterns, parkour across the tops of all the lanterns and ledges without touching the ground to reach the opposite balcony.
  4. 🚠 Zipline: Use the belfry zipline. You must hold onto the bar all the way to the far side of the rope to trigger it.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 20 - 30 Mins Turn the catapult wheel fully to avoid short launches
Speedrun Record 1 Min 15 Sec Catapult launch directly to the final exit door
Mechanics Used Elastic Potential Energy Hold the zipline bar firmly with both hands

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 8: Water

item.title: ⛵ Level 8: Water Walkthrough
item.description:
⛵ Level 8: Water

Objective: Row boats, steer massive cargo ships, operate canal lock valves to raise water levels, scale giant rotating waterwheels, slide down mountain slopes, and dive head-first into the exit. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins Mechanics: Hydro-buoyancy, rudder steering, valve flow control, gear wheel climbing, and sliding friction.

📸 Maritime Zone: Steer cargo ships and light the beacon on the rocky island lighthouse.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: Rowing the Boat & Secret Speedboat

  • Standard Walkthrough: Drag the wooden rowboat into the water, jump in, and grab the oars to row across the bay. Alternatively, stand inside the boat, grab the boat floor with both hands, and jump in the direction you want to travel to wobbly-glide it across.
  • The Speedboat Easter Egg: Instead of rowing, go behind the two large grey rocks at the starting bay. You will find a secret motor-powered speedboat tucked in a tunnel, allowing you to cross instantly.

Stage 2: Steering the Cargo Ship & Canal Locks ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. Jump onto the large cargo steamship and grab the wheel to steer it.
    2. Drive the ship into the first lock chamber.
    3. Run to the lock gates, grab the large wheel valves, and turn them to close the entry gate and open the sluice gates.
    4. The water level will rise, lifting the cargo ship. Drive the ship through the second gate. Repeat the process for the next lock chamber to reach the upper bay.

Stage 3: The Water Plant & Crane

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Reach the water treatment plant. You will see massive rotating waterwheels.
    2. Jump and grab the spokes of the rotating waterwheels to let them lift Bob, then jump across to the opposite catwalk.
    3. Run to the crane controls, grab the levers, and swing the metal cage box. Use the cage to bridge the gap or lift Bob to the high rock wall.

Stage 4: Mountain Slide & Exit Dive

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Walk to the top of the water slide. If you want the “Surfer” achievement, align Bob’s body, slide down the mountain slide, and make sure not to fall into the surrounding water.
    2. At the bottom of the slide, run to the edge of the cliff.
    3. Jump off the cliff, angle Bob’s hands up (for head-first dive) or down (for feet-first landing), and land inside the exit vortex pool.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Cargo Ship Lift-Rail Skip】
You can bypass all the canal locks and the water treatment plant puzzles. Drive the cargo ship directly into the cliff wall near the high lift rail structure. Climb onto the cargo ship's cabin roof, jump off the bow, and grab the lift rail track directly. Climb up the track to reach the mountain slide area, skipping 15 minutes of puzzle solving!

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. 🧘 Breathing exercise: Get out of the water within 100 milliseconds of falling in. Try doing this at the very start of the level.
  2. 🚣 Row, row, row your boat: Use the wooden rowboat to travel all the way to the large cargo steamship.
  3. ⚓ Reverse gear: Dock the cargo steamship backwards into the final canal lock.
  4. 💡 Beacon: Climb the spiral stairs of the lighthouse on the island, grab the lantern light source, and light the lighthouse beacon.
  5. 🏄 Surfer: Slide down the mountain slide without falling off and getting wet.
  6. 🤸 Feet first / Head first: Complete the level by diving into the final exit pool. Dive head-first (arms up, face down) or feet-first.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 20 - 30 Mins Grab boat floors with both hands to maintain steering
Speedrun Record 1 Min 45 Sec Execute the Cargo Ship Lift-Rail skip
Mechanics Used Fluid Buoyancy Balance carefully on the center of the slide

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 9: Power

item.title: ⚡ Level 9: Power Walkthrough
item.description:
⚡ Level 9: Power

Objective: Connect colored electrical cables to circuit ports, operate heavy industrial machinery including forklifts and dump trucks, haul coal to feed furnaces, and ride high-velocity cooling fans to the exit. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins Mechanics: Electrical cable routing, forklift operation, heavy vehicle transport, wind draft lift, and boiler pressure systems.

📸 Grid Control: Connect batteries to power doors and drive industrial vehicles.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: Wiring & The Short-Circuit

  • Walkthrough: Walk up to the starting wall panel. Grab the red cable plug and connect it to the red socket; grab the blue cable plug and connect it to the blue socket. This powers the door. If you want the “Electricity 101” achievement, swap the plug connections to link a single wire directly into both positive and negative terminals (connecting blue to red socket) to trigger an explosive short-circuit.

Stage 2: Forklift Controls & The Statue Battery

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Enter the next yard to find a yellow forklift. Stand on the seat, grab the steering wheel to drive it, and slide the metal forks under the heavy metal roller gate.
    2. Operate the lever to lift the forks, opening the gate.
    3. In the courtyard, locate the giant stone statue holding a glowing battery in its hand.
    4. Climb up the statue’s pedestal, scale its arms, and knock the battery out of its grip to claim it.

Stage 3: Coal Hauling & Boiler Feed ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. Locate the dump truck. Drive it back to the dark coal quarry/cave.
    2. Use your hands to pick up pieces of coal and toss at least 10 pieces into the bed of the truck.
    3. Drive the truck back to the generator building. Dump the coal near the furnaces.
    4. Feed the coal into the open furnace chambers to generate steam pressure.

Stage 4: Floating on Aerodynamic Fans

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Connect three batteries (including the one stolen from the statue) to the main power terminal to power the giant ceiling fan.
    2. Stand directly under the fan. As it starts rotating, the upward wind draft will lift Bob into the air.
    3. Float across the deep void, using your movement keys to steer Bob toward the exit hatch on the far platform.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【Forklift Gate Climbing & Fan Blade Launch】
You do not need to operate the forklift. By parking it against the gate and climbing onto its roll cage, you can reach the top of the wall and jump over, skipping the lever puzzles. Additionally, in the fan room, you can perform a wobbly wall-run along the pipes on the side wall to jump directly to the exit platform, skipping the battery connection.

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. ⚡ The End?: Unlocked automatically by completing the “Power” level.
  2. 💥 Electricity 101: Short-circuit the starting panel by connecting a single cable between the positive and negative terminals.
  3. 🗿 Thief: Steal the battery held by the giant stone statue in the courtyard.
  4. 🔋 Will It Fry: Feed a single appliance (such as the main generator door) with power from 3 batteries simultaneously.
  5. 🏎️ Petrolhead: Cumulative distance achievement. Drive the forklift or the dump truck for a total distance of 1 kilometer around the map.
  6. 🚚 Delivery Boy: Load 10 pieces of coal into the dump truck and successfully deliver them to the main island boiler room.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 25 - 35 Mins Connect cables firmly into sockets to avoid sparking
Speedrun Record 1 Min 05 Sec Climb the forklift roof to bypass the locked roller gates
Mechanics Used Electromagnetic Circuits Direct the air currents by aligning fans properly

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 10: Aztec

item.title: 🗿 Level 10: Aztec Walkthrough
item.description:
🗿 Level 10: Aztec

Objective: Solve ancient temple puzzles using stone leverage, manipulate wobbly counter-weight elevator cages, speed through swinging pendulum traps, balance atop a rolling stone sphere, and leap into the final tomb. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins Mechanics: Leverage mechanics, elevator counter-weights, rapid pendulum timing, sphere balancing, and collision-based wall climbs.

📸 Aztec Ruins: Use wooden beams as levers to knock down heavy stone slabs.

🗺️ Step-by-Step Level walkthrough

Stage 1: The Lever & The Slab Bridge

  • Walkthrough: In the starting room, you will find two wooden poles and a heavy stone slab standing vertically blocking a gap. Place one pole flat on the ground. Wedge the second pole underneath the vertical slab using the flat pole as a fulcrum. Grab the pole and pull down to tip the massive stone slab forward, making it fall and form a bridge over the gap.

Stage 2: The Counter-weight Cage Elevators

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Walk into the yard with two metal cages suspended from ropes.
    2. Jump inside the first cage. Bob’s body weight will cause it to sink, raising the second cage.
    3. Jump from the first cage onto the wall platform, and then jump onto the raised second cage.
    4. From the top of the second cage, jump to the highest ledge. If you want the “Bird’s Eye View” achievement, jump into the nearby tree branches containing a bird’s nest and climb to the top.

Stage 3: The Pendulum Obstacle Course ⭐ Key Puzzle

  • Standard Walkthrough:
    1. You will enter a long corridor guarded by heavy stone pendulums swinging back and forth over a narrow, wobbly bridge.
    2. Observe the swinging pattern.
    3. Run as the pendulum swings away from you. Crouch (Shift) to lower Bob’s profile, making it harder for the swings to knock you into the abyss.
    4. Jump across the gaps between swings. To unlock the “Clockwork” achievement, complete this entire course in under 60 seconds.

Stage 4: Balancing on the Rolling Ball

  • Walkthrough:
    1. Locate the massive stone sphere sitting on a ramp.
    2. Grab the sphere and push it to start rolling.
    3. Jump onto the top of the sphere. As it rolls down the ramp, you must walk or run in the opposite direction of its rotation to stay on top, balancing Bob’s wobbly limbs.
    4. Keep your balance until the ball rolls into the gap, forming a stable stepping stone to reach the final temple entrance.

💡 Pro Tips & Glitch Hacks

【The Statue Hole Exit Skip】
You can bypass almost the entire level. In the second area, instead of navigating the cages, use swing-climbing to climb up the decorative stone carvings on the temple wall. From there, you can climb onto the roof of the temple ruins. Walk toward the rear and locate a hidden gap in the geometry. Drop straight through the hole to land directly in the final exit portal!

🏆 Hidden Achievements & Easter Eggs

  1. 🗿 The End: Unlocked automatically by completing the “Aztec” level.
  2. 🦅 Bird’s Eye View: Climb to the very top of the tree containing a bird’s nest located in the counter-weight cage courtyard.
  3. ⚽ Rollin’: Walk on top of the rolling ball in Stage 4 to cross the gap. You must stay on the sphere without falling off or touching the side walls.
  4. ⏱️ Clockwork: Complete the pendulum obstacle course section in Stage 3 in under 60 seconds from entering the corridor.

📊 Level Telemetry

Parameter Checklist Data Value Recommended Action
Est. Duration 25 - 40 Mins Crouch while passing pendulums to lower center of gravity
Speedrun Record 44.8 Seconds Scale the temple facade to drop into the hidden exit hole
Mechanics Used Fulcrum Leverage Run in reverse direction when balancing on the sphere

Guides version: v1.2 | Signal synced… Next Level: Level 11: Dark

item.title: 🌃 Level 11: Dark
item.description:
🌃 Level 11: Dark

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 🌃 Level 11: Dark Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
After plugging the red and blue wires into the distribution box, pull out the backup generator plug and hang it on the pulley wire to zipline directly to the backyard exit.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

Step on the high-pressure steam vent, and jump the moment the vent releases a steam burst. The steam will lift you up, launching you instantly into the high pipe tunnel.
